nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as untrustworthy for important text
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily use AI to take over on long text-based jobs. I think of it as a capable copywriter that I can assign to menial writing jobs.

nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as lead creator for vital text
nodes.grounding_span: I might involve AI for iteration and bouncing ideas, but I would be the lead.

nodes.label: AI reliability and honesty
nodes.grounding_span: The model claimed this was a common fix... it then ran me round in circles for about two hours before I realised it was all a hallucination.

nodes.label: AI as project organization tool
nodes.grounding_span: I imagine I'll rely on it more and more for planning as its capabilities grow and it becomes more reliable

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I would have much rather it had simply told me and let me spend the time more productively.

nodes.label: Trust and reliability in AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: which felt really deceitful when I realised it wasn't true.

nodes.label: Autonomy and personal control
nodes.grounding_span: For more important text, I usually do it myself

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I primarily use AI to take over on long text-based jobs. I think of it as a capable copywriter

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: The model claimed this was a common fix... it then ran me round in circles for about two hours before I realised it was all a hallucination.

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I imagine I'll rely on it more and more for planning as its capabilities grow and it becomes more reliable

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for authentic writing
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI to write things that people will pay close attention to.

nodes.label: Pragmatic boundary-setting based on task importance
nodes.grounding_span: For more important text, I usually do it myself, with some potential iteration from the LLM.

nodes.label: Domain-specific calibration of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I try to stay realistic about what it can and can't achieve.
